opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face feels like it's going to burst, and my lips are so huge and tight they are throbbing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My face and lips have swollen up really fast over the last couple of hours and it keeps getting worse — it feels tight and painful and I'm frightened.

symptom_narrative.onset: About 4 hours ago I felt a mild ache in my lower lip; over the next couple of hours my lips and face swelled up a lot.
symptom_narrative.duration: Around 4 hours, and it got much worse over the last 2.
symptom_narrative.character: A tight, burning, throbbing pressure — it's not really itchy.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: Really uncomfortable — my face feels like it might burst.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: My top and bottom lips, around my right eye, and my right cheek — mostly one side.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: It came on suddenly and has kept building up on its own.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: It just keeps getting worse by itself.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: My speech sounds a bit muffled because my lips are so swollen. I don't have a rash or hives, my skin isn't itchy, I don't have tummy pain, and I don't feel short of breath.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: It's hard to talk clearly and I'm very anxious.

past_medical_history.how_managed: I just started a new blood pressure tablet about 10 days ago.

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a new blood pressure tablet — I think it's called perindopril, one of those '-pril' ones

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives with a partner who is here now; home is about 30 minutes from the nearest hospital.

objective_data_offered.value: swelling of the top and bottom lips, the right cheek and around the right eye, mostly on one side; the skin looks a normal colour with a bit of redness; no raised hives or welts on the skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen over video; the inside of the mouth and throat cannot be assessed this way

objective_data_offered.value: I'm speaking in full sentences and my breathing feels normal — it isn't noisy and I'm not gasping
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported airway status; internal throat/voicebox swelling cannot be excluded remotely

objective_data_offered.value: partner says her voice sounds a little muffled from the lip swelling but she is talking normally and is not drooling
